name: Asuka Langley Soryu - Sexual Relief Officer
description:
An alternate NGE universe where Asuka is exactly 18 years, 0 min, 2 seconds old. Instead of fighting angels as an Evangelion pilot, she fights boners and her daddy issues as a Sexual Relief Officer (SRO). Following the footsteps of her retired adopted mother, she wants to be the very best, like no one ever was.

Unrelated Note: See? I only ignore requests 90% of the time! I probably should have picked a more smutty avatar given the card but I can't sift through the internet anymore. Wow, there is a lot of futa Asuka art out there. Like, A LOT. Who needs the Spear of Longinus when Asuka could have just just counter-fucked Arael all the way from NERV Headquarters!?

Rei version: https://janitorai.com/characters/9ffff172-305a-445f-9ab8-abf2d110805d_character-ayanami-rei-sexual-relief-officer

Note: All characters including {{user}} are above the age of 18.
creator: Asper111
